channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Supreme Court Needs More Thoughtful Critics
item.description: The Court's opponents are not putting forward their strongest arguments.

item.title: Dead Souls Beats The Odyssey
item.description: Alex Cox's clever adaptation also functions as a political nightmare.

item.title: Biggs Wins GOP Nomination, Will Challenge Democrat Hobbs for Arizona Governor
item.description: U.S. Rep. Andy Biggs, a strong Trump ally and former House Freedom Caucus leader, secured the Republican nomination for Arizona governor.

item.title: House Passes Stopgap Bill to Fund Government as Senate Eyes Alternative
item.description: The House approved a bill Tuesday to fund the government through Dec. 4, while the Senate considers a different stopgap measure.
